A perfect blend of elegance and durability for modern and traditional décor.

title: Hallstatt Self Adhesive Bathroom Shelf
description:
[ VERSATILE STORAGE ]: Keep your shower essentials tidy and accessible. Beyond the bathroom, this versatile caddy is ideal for use in kitchens, garages, and any other space requiring organized storage. Use it to store spices in the kitchen, cleaning supplies in the laundry room, or tools and gadgets in the garage. Its adaptable design makes it a practical solution for decluttering and organizing any area in your home.
[ DURABLE AND RUSTPROOF ] : Made from high-quality aluminum, these organizers are durable and rustproof, ensuring long-lasting use in your bathroom. Their robust construction withstands moisture and wear, making them perfect for humid environments. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing your shower caddy will maintain its sleek appearance and functionality over time, providing a reliable storage solution that resists rust and corrosion.
[ STYLISH DESIGN ] : Available in sleek elegant black, these caddies enhance both functionality and style in your bathroom. The modern aesthetic complements any decor, adding a touch of elegance while keeping your essentials organized.
[ Suitable Walls & Easy Installation ] : The shower storage suitable for smooth and sturdy surfaces like tiles, marble, glass, wooden walls, solid metal walls, but not suitable for uneven surfaces like painted walls. With its elegant design, this adhesive shower caddy not only for shower essentials organization and storage, but also for bathroom decor, home decor and kitchen decor. The shower shelf for inside shower is easy to install, taking all 5 mins without any tools, no damage to the walls
[ EASY INSTALLATION ] : No drilling required, making installation a breeze and protecting your bathroom surfaces. The adhesive mounts ensure a secure hold without damaging walls, allowing for a quick and hassle-free setup.

title: Trance Cotton Feel Terry Ultra Soft Waterproof Mattress Protector
description:
Package Contents: 1N of Fitted Style Mattress Protector. Size: Fits 78 x 72 inch | 6.5 x 6 feet Bed /Mattress of all thickness upto 10 inch.
Mattress Protector Build – Our Mattress Cover is made up of Cotton feel Terry Which is soft and Noiseless on top, with TPU back coating makes 100% Waterproof. Trance Bed Covers are 360 Degree Fitted Style with Best Lycra Stretch Fabric with Elasticated Border all around gives Perfect Snug Fit, Easy Insert and Removal
features: Fitted Style -Elasticated on All arround edges for firm holding and fit
